phrases.cultural_note: Cantillon has limited opening hours. Check the website as it's not open every day.

responses.english: Monday to Friday, 10am to 5pm. Saturday 10am to 4pm.
responses.phonetic: doo luhn-DEE oh vahn-druh-DEE, duh dee ah dee-set uhr. luh sahm-DEE duh dee ah sez uhr
responses.local: Du lundi au vendredi, de dix à dix-sept heures. Le samedi de dix à seize heures.

phrases.text_local: Peut-on faire une visite de la brasserie ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN fair un vee-ZEET duh lah brahs-REE
phrases.cultural_note: Self-guided tours are available during opening hours. You can explore the aging rooms (foeders) and see the open fermentation vats.

responses.english: Yes, the visit is self-guided. No reservation needed.
responses.phonetic: wee, lah vee-ZEET eh LEE-bruh. pah duh ray-zair-vah-SYON nay-seh-SAIR
responses.local: Oui, la visite est libre. Pas de réservation nécessaire.

phrases.cultural_note: Try the Gueuze (blended lambic), Kriek (cherry lambic), or the rare Rosé de Gambrina. The on-tap selection changes seasonally.

responses.english: Gueuze, Kriek, and Rosé de Gambrinus. The menu changes by season.
responses.phonetic: GUHZ, KREEK ay roh-ZAY duh gahm-bree-NOOS. lah kart shahnzh suh-LON lah say-ZON
responses.local: Gueuze, Kriek et Rosé de Gambrinus. La carte change selon la saison.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un musée dans la brasserie ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un moo-ZAY don lah brahs-REE
phrases.cultural_note: The brewery houses a small museum of brewing history. Entry is included in the tasting fee — a great-value experience.

responses.english: Yes, it's included in the tasting price.
responses.phonetic: wee, say ahn-KLOO dahn luh pree duh lah day-goos-tah-SYON
responses.local: Oui, c'est inclus dans le prix de la dégustation.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how much the tasting costs
phrases.cultural_note: The tasting fee includes the self-guided tour and two beer samples. It's excellent value.

responses.english: Seven euros per person, with two tastings included.
responses.phonetic: set uh-ROH par pair-SON, ah-VEK duh day-goos-tah-SYON ahn-KLOOZ
responses.local: Sept euros par personne, avec deux dégustations incluses.
